title: Evil Lives Here
desc: Debra Davis never suspects her husband's perversions are signs of something evil deep inside him.

title: Disappeared
desc: Former basketball star Rico Harris mysteriously vanishes while driving to Seattle. Investigators start a journey that becomes more baffling as time passes.

title: Ghost Asylum
desc: The Tennessee Wraith Chasers travel to the heart of Ohio to investigate the most haunted prison in America - Mansfield Reformatory.

title: Blood Relatives
desc: One family in a small town in the Pacific Northwest seems to have it all, until a secret video and a stash of guns reveals the face of a diabolical killer.

title: True Conviction
desc: A hooded gunman shoots and kills Donna Willard while her son watches from the top of the stairs.

title: The TikTok Man: Catching a Predator
desc: After more than 15 years, victims of the TikTok Man will finally be able to see justice unfold as he's arrested, and a sentence is ready to be handed down.

title: Redrum
desc: When a headless corpse is found on the Wisconsin border, detectives race to identify the victim; who is he and why was he murdered?

title: The Curious Case of Natalia Grace
desc: Michael turns on his former wife at his trail; Kristin's trial looms; a mysterious witness.

title: Body Cam
desc: An armed suspect fires at police; a man locks himself in a garage that catches fire.

title: Death by Fame
desc: A woman and her family strike it rich, and Hollywood comes knocking to give them their own show, but not everyone wants this reality star to shine.

title: The Curious Case of Natalia Grace: The Final Chapter
desc: Natalia fights to break free from the suffocating grip of her manipulative parents, Cynthia and Antwon; as their deceit unravels, she reclaims her life with a new, loving family.

title: The Murder Tapes
desc: Robert Sharp is a retired professor living in Michigan. When he is found brutally murdered with the body burned, people are shocked at the violent death and police wonder who could be responsible.

title: Web of Lies
desc: Retiree Alex Strategos is consumed by loneliness. He turns to internet dating and finds 69-year-old Melissa, but is soon struck by a rush of unexplained illnesses.

title: Betrayed
desc: After getting a divorce, Janet celebrates her freedom with a girls' night. When she's found dead, it takes the police 35 years to bring her murder to justice.

title: Blood Relatives
desc: One family in a small town in the Pacific Northwest seems to have it all, until a secret video and a stash of guns reveals the face of a diabolical killer.

title: Haunted Towns
desc: The team head to the Old Idaho State Penitentiary. Here, they hope to encounter the spirits of two infamous murderers who are rumoured to haunt the building.

desc: A hooded gunman shoots and kills Donna Willard while her son watches from the top of the stairs.

desc: Ryan is climbing the career ladder and all he needs for a perfect life is the perfect woman to share it with. But is the beautiful Jodi as impeccable as she seems?

desc: Beverly Carter is a 50-year-old internet savvy real-estate agent. But when she goes to meet a prospective buyer at a remote house, she never returns.

desc: In Alabama, murder is on the menu at a party after one family's distrust and finger pointing lead detectives on a cross-country search for a killer.

desc: Tyrannised by his father and traumatised by his sexually abusive scout master Heath takes a gun to his family; will more violence follow this massacre?
